# Coolest Codex Apps

> Ten Codex skills for serious software engineering workflows.

Repository: https://github.com/ArcQian-bit/codex-real-engineer-skills
Website: https://arcqian-bit.github.io/codex-real-engineer-skills/

## Summary

Coolest Codex Apps is an open-source collection of 10 Codex `SKILL.md` apps:
`real-engineer`, `repo-cartographer`, `issue-sherpa`, `pr-reviewer`,
`security-scout`, `perf-lab`, `release-captain`, `docs-keeper`,
`frontend-polisher`, and `migration-pilot`.

The collection adapts common engineering-agent patterns from the public
Claude Code and agent-skill ecosystem into Codex-native skills. It focuses on
clear triggers, evidence-first workflows, narrow scopes, and explicit
verification.

## Install

```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ArcQian-bit/codex-real-engineer-skills/main/install.sh | bash
```

Restart Codex after installing.
